trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2026 tests recommend Penne rigate and Spaghetti as top pasta types, highlighting their versatility, texture, and use of high‑quality semolina.
